scenario.context: Station 4 of the day: narrow down typical incidents systematically.
scenario.mission: You analyze standard problems and document a sensible first diagnosis.

station.profile: Office workstation with network and peripherals

customerRequest.subject: Initial diagnosis for station NS-ST-04
customerRequest.body:
Please handle the typical incident cases for NS-ST-04 and document a structured initial diagnosis.

We need clear, traceable steps instead of trial and error.

questions.title: First step for slow startup
questions.prompt: A PC boots very slowly. What is the best first step?

options.text: Check autostarts, load, free storage and event logs
options.rationale: Structured initial diagnosis with high explanatory value.

feedback.correct: Correct: data first, then a decision.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: please narrow down systematically first.

questions.title: Typical causes of a black screen
questions.prompt: Which causes should be checked first? (Multiple selection)

options.rationale: Basic check with a high likelihood of success.

options.text: Correct input channel on the monitor
options.rationale: A common cause with multiple inputs.

options.text: Cable connection at device and monitor
options.rationale: Loose or faulty connections are classic.
Too early and usually not root-related.

feedback.correct: Correct: you start with the obvious technical checks.
feedback.wrong: Partially incorrect: please prioritize the basic checks.

questions.title: Initial diagnosis flow
questions.prompt: Arrange the diagnosis steps in a sensible order.
items: Record the result and next step in the ticket
correctOrder: Record the result and next step in the ticket

feedback.correct: Correct: this is a robust initial diagnosis chain.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: diagnosis should be traceable and documented.

questions.title: Free storage
questions.prompt: SSD size 512 GB. Used are 120 GB, 85 GB, 60 GB and 40 GB. How much storage is free?

feedback.wrong: Please sum used values first and subtract from total capacity.

questions.title: Incident note
questions.prompt: Write a short ticket note (4-5 sentences) with symptom, check step and next step.
questions.expectedOutline: Short, structured, traceable for handover to colleagues.

feedback.wrong: Please separate symptom, check and next action more clearly.
